title: ZeroHash applies for national bank trust charter from OCC to issue stablecoins and custody digital assets
message_html: ZeroHash applies for national bank trust charter from OCC to issue stablecoins and custody digital assets ...
snippet: CoinDesk (@CoinDesk): REGULATION: @zerohashx has applied for a national bank trust charter from the OCC to issue stablecoins and custody digital assets under a single federal framework.
